use tokio::runtime::Builder;

// GOOD: runtime created once, reused for all tasks
fn process_with_retries(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
    let rt = Builder::new_multi_thread()
        .worker_threads(4)
        .build()
        .unwrap();

    items.iter()
        .map(|item| {
            rt.block_on(async {
                process_item(item).await
            })
        })
        .collect()
}

fn run_tasks(tasks: Vec<Task>) {
    let rt = Builder::new_current_thread()
        .build()
        .unwrap();

    for task in tasks {
        rt.block_on(async {
            execute_task(task).await;
        });
    }
}
